from openpyxl import Workbook
from openpyxl.styles import Font, Alignment, Border, Side, PatternFill
from openpyxl.utils import get_column_letter

def build_template(ws):
    ws.title = "工事別原価管理表"

    # Column widths (A=1 through P=16)
    col_widths = {
        1: 3,   # spacer
        2: 4,   # コード
        3: 22,  # 会社名
        4: 10,  # 前期繰越累計
        5: 10,  # 当期請負金額
        6: 10,  # 請負金額累計
        7: 6,   # 出来高率
        8: 10,  # 当期実行予算
        9: 6,   # 実行予算率
        10: 10, # 実行予算累計
        11: 10, # 当期原価
        12: 10, # 原価累計
        13: 3,  # spacer
    }
    for col, width in col_widths.items():
        ws.column_dimensions[get_column_letter(col)].width = width

    num_rows = 52
    num_cols = 13

    # Row heights
    for r in range(1, num_rows + 1):
        ws.row_dimensions[r].height = 13.5
    ws.row_dimensions[1].height = 18
    ws.row_dimensions[2].height = 18
    ws.row_dimensions[3].height = 18

    # 1. Apply thin border to every cell
    thin = Side(style='thin')
    border = Border(top=thin, bottom=thin, left=thin, right=thin)
    for row in ws.iter_rows(min_row=1, max_row=num_rows, min_col=1, max_col=num_cols):
        for cell in row:
            cell.border = border

    # 2. Fills
    header_fill = PatternFill(fill_type='solid', fgColor='C0C0C0')
    subheader_fill = PatternFill(fill_type='solid', fgColor='D9D9D9')

    # Header row fills (row 1 title)
    for c in range(1, num_cols + 1):
        ws.cell(row=1, column=c).fill = header_fill

    # Column header rows (rows 2-3)
    for r in range(2, 4):
        for c in range(1, num_cols + 1):
            ws.cell(row=r, column=c).fill = subheader_fill

    # Total row at bottom
    for c in range(1, num_cols + 1):
        ws.cell(row=num_rows, column=c).fill = subheader_fill

    # 3. Values, fonts, alignment
    bold = Font(bold=True, size=9)
    normal = Font(size=8)
    center = Alignment(horizontal='center', vertical='center', wrap_text=True)
    right = Alignment(horizontal='right', vertical='center')
    left_align = Alignment(horizontal='left', vertical='center')

    # Title row 1
    ws.cell(row=1, column=2).value = "工事別原価管理表　期間：2026/2/1～2026/2/28"
    ws.cell(row=1, column=2).font = bold
    ws.cell(row=1, column=2).alignment = left_align

    ws.cell(row=1, column=12).value = "2026/6/22 10:06"
    ws.cell(row=1, column=12).font = normal
    ws.cell(row=1, column=12).alignment = right

    # Column headers row 2
    headers_r2 = {
        2: "コード",
        3: "会社名",
        4: "前期繰越\n原価累計",
        5: "当期\n請負金額",
        6: "請負金額\n累計",
        7: "出来高率\n(%)",
        8: "当期\n実行予算",
        9: "実行予算率\n(%)",
        10: "実行予算\n累計",
        11: "当期原価",
        12: "原価累計",
    }
    for c, v in headers_r2.items():
        ws.cell(row=2, column=c).value = v
        ws.cell(row=2, column=c).font = bold
        ws.cell(row=2, column=c).alignment = center

    # Sub-header row 3 (page indicator)
    ws.cell(row=3, column=2).value = "1/2ページ"
    ws.cell(row=3, column=2).font = normal
    ws.cell(row=3, column=2).alignment = center

    # Row labels (pre-printed company name labels in column 3, codes in col 2)
    row_labels = [
        (4,  "15", "ﾋﾞﾙ管理原価部門"),
        (5,  "ﾒｲ", "(株)ﾆｺﾑ"),
        (6,  "ﾄ14", "(株)ﾆｺﾑ"),
        (7,  "ﾄ16", "(株)ｷｬﾌﾟﾃﾝｻｰﾋﾞｽ"),
        (8,  "ｻ95", "(株)ｷｮｳｼﾝ"),
        (9,  "ｻ70", "(株)ｻﾝﾍﾞﾙ"),
        (10, "ｻ10", ""),
        (11, "ｻ30", "㈱施工管理基盤整備(東京)施工補助"),
        (12, "ｻ28", "(株)(ﾄﾞｰﾅﾂ)ｷｮｳｼﾝ事業"),
        (13, "ｷ60", "(株)ｷｮｳｼﾝ"),
        (14, "ﾔ51", "一の原価部門"),
        (15, "ﾔ40", "(株)ﾁｪｰﾝ・ｻｰﾋﾞｽﾄﾞ"),
        (16, "ﾔ97", "原価部門管理費"),
        (17, "ﾄ70", "JUNIOR"),
        (18, "ｷ3",  "(株)ｷｮｳｼﾝ"),
        (19, "ｻ32", "(ｷｮｳｼﾝ)別個数出来高連絡"),
        (20, "ｻ20", "(株)ﾊﾞﾙｻﾝｻｰﾋﾞｽ"),
        (21, "ｴ71", "(株)御客様電話窓口"),
        (22, "ｻ20", "(株)ﾊﾞﾙｻﾝｴｷｽﾊﾟｰﾄ"),
        (23, "ｴ-", "ﾍﾞｽﾄｰﾊﾞｰﾄﾅｰｼｯﾌﾟ(株)"),
        (24, "ｻ15", "ｸﾞﾗﾌ"),
        (25, "ｻ15", "直出(株)"),
        (26, "ｻ42", "(株)ﾄｰﾀﾙｻｰﾋﾞｽ"),
        (27, "ｻ15", "GBA①原価部門"),
        (28, "ｻ92", "原価部門管理費①"),
        (29, "ｻ58", "(株)ｷｬﾌﾟﾃﾝｻｰﾋﾞｽ"),
        (30, "ｻ30", "ｻｰﾋﾞｽ(株)ﾄﾞ"),
        (31, "ﾔ23", "ｻｰﾋﾞｽ(株)"),
        (32, "ｻ50", "ｷｮｳｼﾝ(株)ｰ"),
        (33, "ｷ78", "直出(株)ﾊﾞｰﾑｸｰﾍﾝ"),
        (34, "ｷ70", "ｻﾞﾍﾞｰﾙｻｰﾋﾞｽ"),
        (35, "ﾄ03", "(株)ﾄｰﾀﾙｻｰﾋﾞｽ・ﾄﾞ"),
        (36, "ﾔ13", "et maison(株)"),
        (37, "F50", "B STONE(株)"),
        (38, "ﾔ11", "原価部門管理費"),
        (39, "ｻ03", "ｻﾞﾍﾞｰﾙﾐｴ(株)"),
        (40, "ｻ90", "原価部門管理費②"),
        (41, "ｻ35", "(株)ｲﾝﾃﾙ"),
        (42, "ﾔ13", "ｷｮｳｼﾝ原価部門管理費"),
        (43, "ｻ50", ""),
        (52, "計", ""),
    ]
    for item in row_labels:
        r = item[0]
        ws.cell(row=r, column=2).value = item[1]
        ws.cell(row=r, column=2).font = normal
        ws.cell(row=r, column=2).alignment = center
        ws.cell(row=r, column=3).value = item[2]
        ws.cell(row=r, column=3).font = normal
        ws.cell(row=r, column=3).alignment = left_align

    # Total label
    ws.cell(row=num_rows, column=2).value = "計"
    ws.cell(row=num_rows, column=2).font = bold
    ws.cell(row=num_rows, column=2).alignment = center

    # Numeric columns alignment
    for r in range(4, num_rows + 1):
        for c in range(4, 13):
            ws.cell(row=r, column=c).alignment = right
            ws.cell(row=r, column=c).font = normal

    # Page setup
    ws.page_setup.paperSize = 9
    ws.page_setup.fitToPage = True
    ws.page_setup.fitToWidth = 1
    ws.page_setup.fitToHeight = 1
    ws.page_setup.orientation = "landscape"
    ws.page_margins.left = 0.5
    ws.page_margins.right = 0.5
    ws.page_margins.top = 0.5
    ws.page_margins.bottom = 0.5

    # 4. Merge cells LAST
    ws.merge_cells('B1:K1')
    ws.merge_cells('L1:L1')
    ws.merge_cells('B3:L3')
